name: Pacific Index Foundation

data_sources.note: MISCLASSIFICATION FLAG: Pacific Index Foundation is a Fixed Annuity (Pacific Life classification: 'fixed-annuities' URL path; product guide confirms Guaranteed Minimum Surrender Value = 91% of purchase payments). NOT a RILA. The actual Pacific Life RILA is Pacific Protective Growth (see pacific_protective_growth.json).
Pacific Index Foundation product guide (FAC0265-00 2/26). 10% free withdrawal Year 1; point-to-point cap. Full principal protection — no buffer or floor.
Pacific Life Insurance Company AM Best FSR A+ (Superior). Synthetic anchor confirmed.

verification_notes: CRITICAL: Pacific Index Foundation is a Fixed Indexed Annuity / fixed annuity, not a RILA — full principal protection rather than buffer/floor. Should be reclassified or removed from RILA catalog. AM Best A+ confirmed. Excluded from market-coverage % denominator.
